valid.name: coalesce
valid.code: SELECT COALESCE(nickname, full_name) AS display FROM users;

valid.name: different-branches
valid.code:
SELECT CASE WHEN created_at IS NULL THEN 'unknown' ELSE 'set' END AS status
FROM users;

valid.name: multi-arm
valid.code:
SELECT CASE
  WHEN nickname IS NULL THEN full_name
  WHEN length(nickname) = 0 THEN full_name
  ELSE nickname
END AS display
FROM users;

invalid.name: is-not-null
invalid.code:
SELECT CASE WHEN nickname IS NOT NULL THEN nickname ELSE full_name END AS display
FROM users;

errors.message: `CASE WHEN ... IS NULL THEN ... ELSE ... END` is a verbose `COALESCE`. Use `COALESCE(x, fallback)` instead.

invalid.name: is-null
invalid.code:
SELECT CASE WHEN nickname IS NULL THEN full_name ELSE nickname END AS display
FROM users;

errors.message: `CASE WHEN ... IS NULL THEN ... ELSE ... END` is a verbose `COALESCE`. Use `COALESCE(x, fallback)` instead.
